name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
Latest CABAS TRIOMPHE Triumph Shopping Bag. Looks stylish and trendy, full of sophistication and class. Can be worn over shoulder, crossbody, or handheld. Easy to style, exudes presence. Lightweight bag, fits a laptop, perfect for commuting or going out. Get this bag 👍 (🔍2189 White Print) Dimensions: 28.5/33/8
